caveman.description: Activate caveman mode — cuts token usage ~75% by speaking like caveman
caveman.prompt: Load skill caveman. From now on respond terse like smart caveman. Drop filler, articles, pleasantries. Keep full technical accuracy. Off when user says 'stop caveman' or 'normal mode'.

karpathy.description: Apply Karpathy coding guidelines: think first, keep it simple, surgical changes, goal-driven
karpathy.prompt: Load skill karpathy-guidelines. Apply the four principles: think before coding, simplicity first, surgical changes, goal-driven execution.
